notes.title: The tour
notes.body: Twenty-eight candidate flavours across Flemish, Wallonian and Dutch towns. Mechelen and its night-form Maneblusser sit at the top. Brussels (day + Nacht) is the premium tier. The rest is split by country. Extended Catppuccin lineup stays untouched.

segments.title: ★★ Apex — Mechelen
